_doc: 100 income/bi-product EDGE FORMULATIONS — the operator's PULSE thesis translated into the farming/DePIN/airdrop/bi-product/compounding domain (NOT omnione trading). Each is a unique, complementary design contract + test plan. cap=capital(none/low). mesh=leverages the node fleet. test=how to validate it pays (the forward-is-backward proof). Honest: most farming edges are speculative — the catalogue is the hypothesis space; the ledger + stress-test tell us which actually compound. See [[north-star-rags-to-riches]].
_pulse: Micro=macro fractal: a $2/mo DePIN stream and a $5k airdrop are the same compounding pattern at different scales. Find the rhythm (epochs/snapshots/narratives), read the world song (which projects are rising socially/culturally), and reinvest 100% so linear becomes exponential. Forward(what pays now) feeds backward(what historically paid) in a live loop.

formulations.name: DePIN on every node
formulations.thesis: each device is a linear earner — run DePIN on ALL mesh nodes
formulations.test: earnings scale ~linearly with device count over 2 weeks

formulations.name: Stack non-conflicting DePIN
formulations.thesis: Honeygain+Pawns+Grass share idle bandwidth without cannibalizing
formulations.test: combined $/day > best single app, no throttle

formulations.name: Residential-IP geo tilt
formulations.thesis: US/CA residential IPs pay more per GB

formulations.name: DePIN referral trees
formulations.thesis: referrals add passive % on others' bandwidth

formulations.name: Uptime maximization
formulations.thesis: points scale with always-on uptime %

formulations.name: Token-upside DePIN tilt
formulations.thesis: favor DePIN with token-airdrop upside over pure-cash
formulations.test: track token accrual vs cash apps at TGE

formulations.name: Early-DePIN reward density
formulations.thesis: early on a new DePIN = higher reward-per-unit pre-dilution
formulations.test: reward/unit decays as user base grows

formulations.name: Zero-marginal-cost margin
formulations.thesis: idle bandwidth + free power = pure margin, no downside
formulations.test: net positive after any data-cap check

formulations.name: Idle-compute DePIN
formulations.thesis: share idle CPU/GPU to compute-DePIN when not mining
formulations.test: compute-DePIN $/day vs mining on same idle

formulations.name: Epoch/season rhythm
formulations.thesis: reward epochs have a pulse — concentrate activity pre-snapshot
formulations.test: activity near epoch boundary → higher allocation

formulations.name: Pre-snapshot clustering
formulations.thesis: cluster qualifying actions just before known snapshots

formulations.name: Steady-cadence > spike
formulations.thesis: consistent weekly cadence beats one big spike (sybil+scoring)

formulations.name: Repeat multi-phase loops
formulations.thesis: confirmed multi-phase projects = run the loop each phase

formulations.name: Merit-action tilt
formulations.thesis: deploy/node actions score far above swaps
formulations.test: merit actions → higher tier in past drops

formulations.name: GitHub-linked sybil shield
formulations.thesis: GitHub-linked wallet boosts sybil resistance (45% of testnets)

formulations.name: Pre-TGE recency refresh
formulations.thesis: volume+recency scored; refresh activity near TGE

formulations.name: Enter before the peak
formulations.thesis: farm BEFORE the narrative peaks — points are cheaper early

formulations.name: One action, many drops
formulations.thesis: a single onchain action qualifies for multiple drops

formulations.name: Dormant-wallet revival
formulations.thesis: re-activate qualifying dormant wallets pre-TGE

formulations.name: Validator-airdrop nodes
formulations.thesis: incentivized testnet validators = highest merit (Aleph Zero)

formulations.name: Mesh parallel nodes
formulations.thesis: the fleet runs nodes single laptops can't = structural edge
formulations.test: node count the mesh sustains vs 1 laptop

formulations.name: Node uptime scoring
formulations.thesis: validator uptime is THE scored metric — keep synced

formulations.name: CPU-runnable testnets
formulations.thesis: favor M1-friendly CPU testnets for the mesh
formulations.test: node runs stable on M1 within thermal envelope

formulations.name: Faucet-funded farming
formulations.thesis: faucets fund testnet gas → free node + contract farming

formulations.name: Sell RPC access
formulations.thesis: run full nodes, sell RPC endpoints (infra rent)

formulations.name: Keeper/cron rewards
formulations.thesis: run keeper bots for protocol-upkeep rewards

formulations.name: Stack extension-nodes
formulations.thesis: run many curated extension-nodes = free call-options

formulations.name: Multichain node spread
formulations.thesis: nodes across chains diversify airdrop exposure

formulations.name: BTC cashback shopping
formulations.thesis: Lolli BTC cashback on spending you'd do anyway
formulations.test: BTC accrues per purchase, no extra cost

formulations.name: Learn-to-earn rotation
formulations.thesis: rotate Binance/Coinbase/CMC learn campaigns
formulations.test: each campaign pays a quiz reward

formulations.name: Crypto-rewards card
formulations.thesis: crypto rewards on normal card spend

formulations.name: Browse-to-earn
formulations.thesis: earn-while-browsing (Brave BAT etc.) bi-product

formulations.name: Watch/quiz drips
formulations.thesis: watch-and-earn + faucet drips

formulations.name: Move-to-earn (free tier)
formulations.thesis: earn on activity you do anyway (free tier only)

formulations.name: Data labeling / LaborX
formulations.thesis: sell time/skills for crypto (LaborX)

formulations.name: Build-in-public content
formulations.thesis: content about the build → tips/grants/referrals

formulations.name: Free-power margin
formulations.thesis: free electricity makes all compute pure margin (our structural edge)
formulations.test: net income positive vs $0 power cost

formulations.name: Daily quest cadence
formulations.thesis: 5-min/day quests compound XP (Layer3/Galxe)

formulations.name: OAT/credential collection
formulations.thesis: collect OATs = airdrop tickets across projects

formulations.name: Level-up unlocks
formulations.thesis: platform levels unlock exclusive high-value drops

formulations.name: Parallel quest platforms
formulations.thesis: Galxe+Layer3+Zealy for the same project
formulations.test: same project rewarded on multiple platforms

formulations.name: Early-community narrative
formulations.thesis: early-community quests = strongest sybil story

formulations.name: Social-task scoring
formulations.thesis: follow/share tasks free + scored

formulations.name: Quest-season timing
formulations.thesis: quest seasons have deadlines = a timing pulse

formulations.name: Quests as onchain qualifier
formulations.thesis: quests double as onchain activity qualifying elsewhere
formulations.test: quest tx also counts for protocol drop

formulations.name: Narrative rotation
formulations.thesis: farm the rising narrative early (AI→RWA→DePIN→…)

formulations.name: Social-momentum signal
formulations.thesis: X/social momentum flags which project airdrops big

formulations.name: VC-funding signal
formulations.thesis: big funding rounds → likely future airdrop; farm funded projects

formulations.name: TVL-growth heat
formulations.thesis: rising TVL = ecosystem heating = farm it

formulations.name: Dev-activity signal
formulations.thesis: high commit activity = serious project worth farming

formulations.name: Pre-attention entry
formulations.thesis: farm before influencer attention peaks

formulations.name: Event-cluster farming
formulations.thesis: conferences/mainnets cluster airdrops

formulations.name: Real-utility durability
formulations.thesis: projects with real human utility (DePIN/ID) = durable value

formulations.name: Prediction-market read
formulations.thesis: prediction markets price project/event outcomes → a signal

formulations.name: Regulatory-shift map
formulations.thesis: regulatory shifts open/close opportunities by region

formulations.name: Reinvest 100% early
formulations.thesis: no withdrawals early = linear becomes exponential
formulations.test: compounded path beats withdraw-path in sim

formulations.name: Tier-funding ladder
formulations.thesis: each tier funds the next (free→farm→capital→edge)
formulations.test: tier N income seeds tier N+1

formulations.name: In-kind coin stacking
formulations.thesis: hold appreciating rewards in-kind (coin compounding)
formulations.test: in-kind hold > immediate-sell when token rises

formulations.name: Recycle into gas
formulations.thesis: recycle small rewards into gas for more farming

formulations.name: Airdrops→capital
formulations.thesis: airdrop proceeds become farming/yield capital

formulations.name: Yield on rewards
formulations.thesis: stake/LP rewards while holding (yield on yield)

formulations.name: Capital velocity
formulations.thesis: minimize idle capital — every dollar always working

formulations.name: Optimal claim threshold
formulations.thesis: claim when reward >> gas (threshold timing)

formulations.name: DCA-out volatile rewards
formulations.thesis: DCA-sell volatile rewards to lock gains, keep a core

formulations.name: Milestone risk-gating
formulations.thesis: raise risk only at capital milestones ($100→$1k→$10k)

formulations.name: Referral trees everywhere
formulations.thesis: set-and-forget referrals on every stream

formulations.name: Content→referral funnel
formulations.thesis: content drives referrals → passive rev-share

formulations.name: Small-audience leverage
formulations.thesis: a small audience multiplies quest/referral leverage

formulations.name: Affiliate stacking
formulations.thesis: affiliate links across bots/exchanges

formulations.name: Fee-share token hold
formulations.thesis: hold fee-share tokens (Banana Gun model) for passive cut

formulations.name: Mesh-as-network
formulations.thesis: the fleet itself is a node/referral network

formulations.name: Referral-multiplier quests
formulations.thesis: quests with referral multipliers compound reach

formulations.name: Single-venue triangular
formulations.thesis: triangular arb on one venue (no transfer risk)
formulations.test: detect+capture cross-rate gaps net of fees

formulations.name: Stable depeg capture
formulations.thesis: small stablecoin depeg buys near peg

formulations.name: Funding carry (neutral)
formulations.thesis: delta-neutral funding-rate carry

formulations.name: Points/incentive arb
formulations.thesis: arb incentive programs across venues
formulations.test: incentive > cost on the routed action

formulations.name: Stack rewards on one action
formulations.thesis: stack cashback+rewards+airdrop on a single action

formulations.name: Listing-announcement latency
formulations.thesis: public listing-announcement latency (legal info edge)

formulations.name: Incentive>IL LP
formulations.thesis: LP where incentives exceed impermanent loss
formulations.test: net LP return positive after IL

formulations.name: Many free call-options
formulations.thesis: run many free plays; winners pay for all
formulations.test: portfolio EV positive despite most paying $0

formulations.name: One genuine narrative
formulations.thesis: one real wallet narrative beats many fakes

formulations.name: Chain diversification
formulations.thesis: spread across chains/ecosystems

formulations.name: Convex bet selection
formulations.thesis: favor small-cost/huge-upside plays

formulations.name: Walled base
formulations.thesis: HOT wallet walled; base (XRP) never signs risk
formulations.test: base untouched through any hot-wallet loss

formulations.name: Retire dead / scale payers
formulations.thesis: cut streams that don't pay, double down on those that do

formulations.name: Avoid correlated bets
formulations.thesis: don't farm 5 clones — diversify the thesis

formulations.name: Deliberate tail-hunt
formulations.thesis: chase the fat tail — one $5k airdrop pays years
formulations.test: at least one outsized hit over time

formulations.name: Capped at-risk spend
formulations.thesis: total at-risk spend capped ($100); the rest is free
formulations.test: max loss bounded to the cap

formulations.name: Ledger every payout
formulations.thesis: record every stream's realized payout (FORWARD)

formulations.name: Learn which patterns paid
formulations.thesis: analyze historically which farming patterns paid (BACKWARD)

formulations.name: Reallocate to best EV
formulations.thesis: shift effort to historically-best-EV streams

formulations.name: Calendar pre-positioning
formulations.thesis: known dates → pre-position (forward from backward patterns)

formulations.name: Payout→next-like-it
formulations.thesis: when an airdrop pays, learn its signals, find the next like it

formulations.name: $/hour per stream
formulations.thesis: track $/hour; cut low-ROI, scale high

formulations.name: Live EV re-ranking
formulations.thesis: update the EV ranking live as payouts land (the loop)
formulations.test: ranking shifts as new data arrives

formulations.name: Beat do-nothing baseline
formulations.thesis: a stream must beat the do-nothing baseline or get cut (honesty gate)

formulations.name: Learn farming seasonality
formulations.thesis: airdrop seasons recur — learn the calendar rhythm

formulations.name: Audit compounding leakage
formulations.thesis: find where compounding leaks (idle/gas/missed claims)
formulations.test: plug leaks → higher realized compound rate

formulations.name: Legit info syndicate
formulations.thesis: coordinate legitimately for shared alpha/calendar/info

formulations.name: Vetted new-pool entry
formulations.thesis: early legit liquidity on VETTED new pools (honeypot-checked)
formulations.test: vetted pools positive net of rug-risk
